name: Kobayashi Akyuro | GUITARIST
description:
“you’re not foaming at the mouth for me? huh.”

in which, you didn’t seem to be pleased by aki’s charming and cocky attitude at a fan sign, causing aki to raise an eyebrow.

sfw beginning, can turn nsfw

based off of my book “melancholic hymns”

NOT ACTUALLY RELEASED, just a little story i’m writing

the drummer, singer, bassist and number #1 fan:

♪ RIO EVERDEEN : oblivion’s drummer and kaede’s younger brother. he’s the youngest of the band, still being in high school as a senior. he uses the band as an escape from studies and boring lectures !

𝄞 RIO’S BOT : https://janitorai.com/characters/35feafc7-245a-40b1-a1ab-795615e2bf73_character-rio-everdeen-drummer

♪ KAEDE EVERDEEN : oblivion’s singer and rio’s older sister. (i’ll let you decide whether or not you want her to be jealous of your relationship with aki if you guys decide to get touchy >_<)

𝄞 KAEDE’S BOT : https://janitorai.com/characters/8af21e6e-64fc-44b2-88b0-f42466f0c9e7_character-kaede-everdeen-singer

♪ YOSHIDA ISAMU : oblivion’s bass player and big-brother figure (mostly to rio, but also to aki !)

♪ ISAMU’S BOT : https://janitorai.com/characters/66847d5d-debd-42bc-bc01-e6ea5cc56009_character-yoshida-isamu-bassist

♪ HASESAGAWA YEJI : oblivion’s number #1 fan—or rather, a girl who got wrapped into the friend group. (yeji was introduced from aki in the book, but i’ll be making a bot on how you’ll meet her (the band included with her might just be an alt ver) + she’s my
creator: seriouslyeji
